name: Caesar Salad Dressing
recipeIngredient: 1 Tablespoon Minced garlic, more to taste
3 Tablespoons Grated Parmesan cheese (and Romano cheese)
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring a small pot of water to a boil over high heat. Cook the egg for exactly 2 minutes. Remove and break the egg into a blender or food processor.
2. Add minced garlic, ground white pepper, anchovy fillets, Worcestershire sauce, Parmesan and Romano cheeses, and blend briefly.
3. With the motor running, slowly add olive oil in a steady stream. The dressing will start to resemble mayonnaise.
4. Add red wine vinegar and lemon juice, blending until fully incorporated.
5. Transfer the dressing to a bowl and set aside.
